#define rrep(i, n) for(int i = (n)-1; i >= 0; i--)

#define rrep1(i, n) for(int i = (n); i > 0; i--)

#define EN begin(), end()

#define REN rbegin(), rend()

#define UNIQUE(v) v.erase(unique(V.begin(), V.end()), V.end());

#define angle(a) acos((a).X/(abs(a)))

#define vec(a, b) ((b)-(a))

#define cross(a, b) ((conj(a)*(b)).Y)

#define norm(a) (abs(a)*abs(a))

#define length(a) (abs(a))

#define unite(a, b) (norm(a-b) < EPS)

#define intersect(a, b, c, d) (unite(a, c) || unite(b, c) || unite(a, d) || unite(b, d))

#define cw(a, b, c) (cross(vec(a, b), vec(a, c)) < 0)
